summary_en: 200,000 shares (2.47% of outstanding), ¥100M upper limit, market purchase via discretionary trading agreement, May 21 – Aug 31, 2026. Rationale: shareholder return enhancement and capital efficiency improvement.
title_en: Notice regarding Determination of Matters Related to Acquisition of Treasury Stock
translation_en_brief: Tokyo Kikai Seisakusho announced on May 20, 2026 that its board of directors resolved to acquire up to 200,000 treasury shares (2.47% of shares outstanding, excluding treasury stock) within a budget ceiling of ¥100 million. The acquisition will be conducted via market purchase under a discretionary trading agreement between May 21 and August 31, 2026. The stated purpose is to enhance shareholder returns and improve capital efficiency. As of March 31, 2026, the company held 656,015 treasury shares against 8,072,905 shares outstanding (excluding treasury).
